scriptTask.name: Validate Submitted Data
scriptTask.documentation: Validate submitted data ensuring required fields are present, valid and correct

scriptTask.name: Create Case in CMS
scriptTask.documentation: Create a new case in the CMS PostgreSQL database with status 00 - DRAFT

scriptTask.name: Create ATM Task
scriptTask.documentation: Create a task for the Alert Triage Module

scriptTask.name: Route Case to ATM
scriptTask.documentation: Route the case to the Alert Triage Module

scriptTask.name: Autoclose Case
scriptTask.documentation: Invoke autoclose case use case if conditions are met

scriptTask.name: Create Investigation Task
scriptTask.documentation: Create task to investigate the case

userTask.name: Assign to Investigations Queue
userTask.documentation: Assign the investigation task to the Investigations work queue

scriptTask.name: Log Case Creation
scriptTask.documentation: Audit and system log the case creation
